name: Kale

pros.title: micronutrient density is ridiculous
pros.explanation: This is the kind of vegetable profile that can clearly carry a category.

pros.title: easy to build meals around
pros.explanation: A practical plus because good foods need realistic use cases.

pros.title: very low downside whole food
pros.explanation: Vegetables win a lot simply by offering clean nutritional payoff.

cons.title: freshness and prep can matter
cons.explanation: Practical friction is still a real downside.

cons.title: rarely carries a meal by itself
cons.explanation: That is normal here, but still part of the tradeoff.

cons.title: energy density is very low
cons.explanation: Good for some use cases, but not enough on its own.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
